# Scenario: reasoning-midline-boundary streaming variant.
#
# Regression pin for the "streaming parts glued on one line" bug:
# the reasoning's only delta ends MID-LINE (no trailing newline), then a
# new text part arrives and starts streaming.  Without the newline
# separator in update-part Case 2, the text delta would append directly
# onto the reasoning's tail:
#     "...state carefully.Here is the diagnostic summary..."
# With the fix, streaming output matches the refresh render.

:session ses_midline_boundary
:directory /tmp/midline-boundary

# --- User message ---
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/midline-boundary","payload":{"type":"message.updated","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_midline_boundary","info":{"id":"msg_u_midline","role":"user","sessionID":"ses_midline_boundary","time":{"created":1700000000000},"agent":"Assistant","model":{"providerID":"anthropic","modelID":"claude-opus-4-6"}}}}}

:sse {"directory":"/tmp/midline-boundary","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_midline_boundary","part":{"id":"prt_u1","type":"text","text":"run the diagnostic","messageID":"msg_u_midline","sessionID":"ses_midline_boundary"},"time":1700000000100}}}

# --- Assistant message starts ---
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/midline-boundary","payload":{"type":"message.updated","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_midline_boundary","info":{"id":"msg_a_midline","parentID":"msg_u_midline","role":"assistant","agent":"Assistant","modelID":"claude-opus-4-6","providerID":"anthropic","time":{"created":1700000001000},"sessionID":"ses_midline_boundary"}}}}

# --- Reasoning part announced (empty placeholder) ---
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/midline-boundary","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_midline_boundary","part":{"id":"prt_r_midline","messageID":"msg_a_midline","sessionID":"ses_midline_boundary","type":"reasoning","text":"","time":{"start":1700000002000}},"time":1700000002001}}}

# --- Reasoning delta ENDING MID-LINE (no trailing newline) ---
# This is the crux of the regression: the previous-part tail the next
# part's first delta will land on.
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/midline-boundary","payload":{"type":"message.part.delta","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_midline_boundary","messageID":"msg_a_midline","partID":"prt_r_midline","field":"text","delta":"Looking at the request, I need to check the state carefully."}}}

# --- Reasoning finalization (message.part.updated with :end, no delta) ---
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/midline-boundary","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_midline_boundary","part":{"id":"prt_r_midline","messageID":"msg_a_midline","sessionID":"ses_midline_boundary","type":"reasoning","text":"Looking at the request, I need to check the state carefully.","time":{"start":1700000002000,"end":1700000003000}},"time":1700000003001}}}

# --- New text part announced (empty, no delta yet) ---
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/midline-boundary","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_midline_boundary","part":{"id":"prt_t_midline","messageID":"msg_a_midline","sessionID":"ses_midline_boundary","type":"text","text":"","time":{"start":1700000004000}},"time":1700000004001}}}

# --- Text first delta — must NOT glue onto reasoning's tail ---
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/midline-boundary","payload":{"type":"message.part.delta","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_midline_boundary","messageID":"msg_a_midline","partID":"prt_t_midline","field":"text","delta":"Here is the diagnostic summary for your review."}}}

# --- Text finalization ---
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/midline-boundary","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_midline_boundary","part":{"id":"prt_t_midline","messageID":"msg_a_midline","sessionID":"ses_midline_boundary","type":"text","text":"Here is the diagnostic summary for your review.","time":{"start":1700000004000,"end":1700000005000}},"time":1700000005001}}}

# --- Assistant message finalization ---
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/midline-boundary","payload":{"type":"message.updated","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_midline_boundary","info":{"id":"msg_a_midline","parentID":"msg_u_midline","role":"assistant","agent":"Assistant","modelID":"claude-opus-4-6","providerID":"anthropic","time":{"created":1700000001000,"completed":1700000005000},"tokens":{"total":100,"input":50,"output":50,"reasoning":20,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}},"finish":"stop","cost":0,"sessionID":"ses_midline_boundary"}}}}

:sse {"directory":"/tmp/midline-boundary","payload":{"type":"session.status","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_midline_boundary","status":{"type":"idle"}}}}

:sse {"directory":"/tmp/midline-boundary","payload":{"type":"session.idle","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_midline_boundary"}}}

# --- Assertions ---

:assert-contains run the diagnostic
:assert-contains state carefully
:assert-contains Here is the diagnostic summary

# The bug: reasoning tail + text first delta glued onto one line.
# With the fix, they appear on separate lines — so the concatenated
# form must NOT be present.
:assert-not-contains carefully.Here is the diagnostic
